findings.message: The chosen-approach summary is stale relative to the rest of the document. This line still says 'hue 120 values' and only mentions reducing --color-primary-dark, while the actual chosen scope later is hue 110 and saturation changes across --color-primary, --color-primary-hover, and --color-primary-active dark states. Planning should not inherit two different implementations.

The option comparison misstates the implementation surface. Option A is described as '4 files instead of 1,' but Option B would still require changes to tokens.ts and regenerated tokens.css, so the real tradeoff is 4 files vs 2.

The chart-6 = hsl 60 tradeoff is acknowledged but still under-evidenced. In MenuPerformanceDashboard.tsx:180, chart-6 is paired directly with chart-3, so this change turns the only two-series doughnut using that token from blue/orange into yellow/orange.

The dark-state token handling is materially improved. This revision now correctly carries the live --color-primary-hover and --color-primary-active dark values from tokens.ts, avoiding the earlier mismatch.
